name: devglobe-codex-plugin
description: DevGlobe skill for Codex CLI - appear active on the globe while coding with AI

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/setup.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/setup.js && esbuild src/uninstall.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/uninstall.js && esbuild src/update-status.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/update-status.js
